title: Guide chapter copy tweak to exercise v0.4 contentRoutes → /guide/ mapping and baselines
acceptance_criteria: Exactly one sentence is edited inside one file matching site/src/content/guide/0[1-9]-*.mdx; the edit is a minor copy tweak (rewording / tightening) with no added or removed headings, lists, code blocks, frontmatter keys, or cross-references.
No other source files are modified; the diff in site/ touches only the one guide chapter.
`npm run build` in site/ succeeds after the change (astro check 0 errors, astro build produces all static pages).

`cloverleaf-cli affected-routes <repo_root> CLV-008` resolves to the JSON array `["/guide/"]`, confirming the consumer override at .cloverleaf/config/affected-routes.json maps site/src/content/guide/** to /guide/ via contentRoutes.

New baseline PNGs exist at .cloverleaf/baselines/guide-mobile.png, .cloverleaf/baselines/guide-tablet.png, and .cloverleaf/baselines/guide-desktop.png, each captured from the post-change /guide/ route at the corresponding viewport size (mobile 375x667, tablet 768x1024, desktop 1280x800).
The merge commit to main contains the guide copy tweak and all three /guide/ baseline PNGs together as a single atomic changeset.
definition_of_done: The single-sentence guide copy edit and the three new .cloverleaf/baselines/guide-{mobile,tablet,desktop}.png baseline PNGs are merged to main in one commit; the site build passes; only /guide/ baselines are new, and no baselines for other routes are added or modified.
